.github/workflows/maven.yml.general_idea: Update the GitHub Actions workflow to use JDK 17 instead of JDK 11 for the build environment.

src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/coursesetu.general_idea: Replace deprecated Spring Security annotation EnableGlobalMethodSecurity with the new EnableMethodSecurity for Spring Boot 3 compatibility.
src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/coursesetu.why_exists: EnableGlobalMethodSecurity is removed in Spring Security 6 (used by Spring Boot 3), causing a compile error 'cannot find symbol'.

src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/coursesetu.general_idea: Replace deprecated WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter with SecurityFilterChain beans for REST security configuration.
src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/coursesetu.why_exists: WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter is deprecated in Spring Security 5.7+ and removed in Spring Security 6 (Spring Boot 3), causing compilation errors if the class is extended.
src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/coursesetu.before: public static class CourseUnlockerRestSecurityConfigurationAdapter extends WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter { ... @Override public void configure(HttpSecurity http) ... }

src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/coursesetu.general_idea: Replace deprecated WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter with SecurityFilterChain beans for Web/LTI security configuration.
src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/coursesetu.why_exists: WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter is deprecated in Spring Security 5.7+ and removed in Spring Security 6 (Spring Boot 3), causing compilation errors if the class is extended.
src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/coursesetu.before: public static class CourseUnlockerWebSecurityConfigurerAdapter extends WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter { ... @Override protected void configure(HttpSecurity http) ... }

src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/coursesetu.general_idea: Replace deprecated WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter configure(WebSecurity) method with WebSecurityCustomizer bean.
src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/coursesetu.why_exists: WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter is deprecated in Spring Security 5.7+ and removed in Spring Security 6 (Spring Boot 3), causing compilation errors if the class is extended.
src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/coursesetu.before: @Override public void configure(WebSecurity web) throws Exception { web.ignoring().antMatchers(...); }

src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/coursesetu.general_idea: Update HttpSecurity DSL from imperative style to lambda-based style.
src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/coursesetu.why_exists: The imperative methods like .and() and .authorizeRequests() are deprecated in Spring Security 6; the new lambda-based API is required for compilation with Spring Boot 3.

src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/coursesetu.general_idea: Replace deprecated antMatchers with requestMatchers in HttpSecurity configuration.
src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/coursesetu.why_exists: antMatchers is deprecated in Spring Security 5.7+ and removed in Spring Security 6; using it causes compilation errors or warnings that block strict builds.

src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/coursesetu.general_idea: Replace deprecated authorizeRequests with authorizeHttpRequests in HttpSecurity configuration.
src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/coursesetu.why_exists: authorizeRequests is deprecated in Spring Security 5.7+ and removed in Spring Security 6; using it causes compilation errors.

src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/coursesetu.general_idea: Update OAuth2 Resource Server JWT configuration to use lambda style.
src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/coursesetu.why_exists: The imperative .jwt() method is deprecated in Spring Security 6; the lambda-based configuration is required for compatibility.

src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/coursesetu.general_idea: Update LTI13Configurer application to use lambda style.
src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/coursesetu.why_exists: The imperative .apply() method is deprecated in Spring Security 6; the lambda-based .with() method is required for compatibility.

src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/coursesetu.general_idea: Update WebSecurity ignoring configuration to use requestMatchers.
src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/coursesetu.why_exists: antMatchers is deprecated in Spring Security 5.7+ and removed in Spring Security 6; using it causes compilation errors.

src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/coursesetu.general_idea: Migrate servlet API import from javax to jakarta namespace to align with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/coursesetu.why_exists: Compile error: package javax.servlet.http does not exist in Jakarta EE 9+ environments (Spring Boot 3).
